deps_semantics: Each task depends on its right-neighbour in the tau-chain (higher tau = easier = solved first). nc4-sweeps are independent parallel chains.
notes: g100_t0150 and g100_t0200: re-queued after gha-25460609459 stalled at iter=4000. Both now done.
All 1-R² values are weighted by ex-ante probability (see EQUATIONS.md §7).
Checkpoints listed for done tasks are the expected paths.
